assertions.rationale: Response explicitly shows removing IClock and using System.TimeProvider.

assertions.assertion: Uses GetUtcNow() method instead of UtcNow property
assertions.rationale: Response shows `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow()` and notes it replaces the UtcNow property.

assertions.assertion: TimeProvider is injected via constructor (standard DI)
assertions.rationale: Response shows constructor injection: `public MyTokenValidator(TimeProvider timeProvider)`.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT reference Duende.IdentityServer.IClock or ICancellationTokenProvider
assertions.rationale: Response states both IClock and ICancellationTokenProvider are removed; the new code only uses TimeProvider.
